overview.description: The Inspire Corporate Bond ETF (IBD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an equally weighted index of bonds issued by S&P 500-component companies that meet biblically responsible investing standards according to the Issuer. IBD was launched on Jul 10, 2017 and is issued by Inspire.
infoTable: Inspire Corporate Bond Impact Equal Weight Index
